org.springframework.ai.anthropic.AnthropicCacheOptions.Builder

Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.anthropic
Spring AI integration with Anthropic's Claude models using the official Anthropic Java SDK.

    AnthropicCacheOptions.Builder.cacheToolResults(@Nullable Boolean cacheToolResults)
    Place a cache_control breakpoint on the last tool result message of the request so that tool outputs are cached across tool-calling rounds.
